title: Celestial Anomaly
definition: An unexplained and deliberate alteration of space-time, as evidenced by the presence of a natural structure bearing an unnatural signature on Kepler-1625's moon.

difficulty_levels.beginner: An abnormal change in space-time that appears to be intentional and cannot be explained by known astrophysical phenomena, as discovered on a celestial body near Kepler-1625.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A mysterious manipulation of space-time that violates our current understanding of physics, observed on the moon orbiting Kepler-1625 and suggesting advanced technology or uncharted phenomena.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical conundrum presenting itself as an intentional alteration of space-time, which challenges existing theories and opens up new questions about the nature of reality and the capabilities of unknown civilizations.

extra_fields.insight: The discovery of a deliberate celestial anomaly that challenges current astrophysics and hints at advanced technology or uncharted phenomena.
